checks.description: When valid_out is asserted, data_out must equal the sum of the four most recent data_in values that were presented with valid_in=1.
notes: Conservative check; does not assume fixed latency, only requires that after a sequence of four valid inputs, a later cycle with valid_out=1 shows the correct sum.
checks.pass_condition: If valid_out=1, then data_out matches the accumulated sum of the last four data_in values that had valid_in=1, regardless of exact cycle offset.
